# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-PRV-041](task-0108): Provider Authorization

## Purpose

Implement provider authorization.

## Scope

- Authz rules
- Permissions
- Access control

## Implementation

1. Define rules
2. Add permissions
3. Implement access control

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Rules defined
2. Permissions work
3. Access controlled
